questionHtml:
What effect does increasing both pressure and temperature have on the equilibrium constant, Kc?

N2 (g) + 3H2 (g) ⇌ 2NH3 (g)           ΔH = −45.9 kJ

A.  Decreases

B.  Increases

C.  Remains constant

D.  Cannot be predicted as effects are opposite

meta.title: What effect does increasing both pressure and temperature have on the equilibrium constant, Kc? N2 (g) + 3H2 (g) ⇌ 2NH3 (g) ΔH = −45.9 kJ A. Decreases B. Increases C. Remains const
